specialOffer.featuredDescription: Get exclusive lock-in pricing for bulk orders. Maximize margins with OEM quality for bike workshops, distributors, and resellers.

about.leadText: Shree Krishna Enterprises is a trusted manufacturer and supplier of high-quality two-wheeler spare parts and rubber components.
about.description: Established in 2010, we specialize in products like Splendor Drum Rubber, Activa Air Pipe, and Brake accessories that meet strict OEM standards. Based in Pune, Maharashtra, we are committed to providing highly durable parts with reliable service to workshops and dealers across India.

items.question: What kind of two-wheeler rubber parts do you manufacture?
items.answer: We manufacture a wide range of OEM quality rubber components including Drum Rubbers (Splendor, Pulsar), Shocker Seals, Air Pipes (Activa), Air Filters, and Brake/Clutch parts for major two-wheeler brands.

items.question: Do you supply parts for wholesale or bulk orders?
items.answer: Yes! We specialize in B2B wholesale distribution. Special discounts are available on bulk volume orders for bike workshops, local dealers, and resellers.

items.question: Are your rubber components compatible with all bike models?
items.answer: Our components are precisely designed for specific models like Hero Honda, Pulsar, Activa, Enfield Bullet, and Unicorn. Check our product catalog for precise compatibility.

items.question: Do you ship across India?
items.answer: Absolutely. Our manufacturing hub is in Pune, but our robust logistics network is capable of delivering safely packed bulk orders to workshops across India.

items.question: How can I request a sample or full product catalog?
items.answer: You can download our full 2025 Price List directly from the homepage. Alternatively, for specific sample requests, contact Mr. Parth Bhojane via phone or email.
